note: Updated 2026-06-11: added 10 new covers for cat-kneading-blanket ... dog-begs-at-table batch. Run generate_covers_batch.py after quota reset (Pacific midnight = 07:00 UTC).

covers.prompt: A grey tabby cat lying on a person's chest, eyes gently closed, face in close-up, subtle throat vibration visible in the fur. Light: warm amber lamplight from the right, soft evening interior, bokeh background of a cozy Russian apartment living room. Camera: 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, very shallow depth of field, fur texture sharp. Composition: cat's face fills left two-thirds, negative space on right, slightly low angle to capture the trust in the pose. Style: editorial magazine photography, ultra realistic, National Geographic animal portrait level. Color: warm earth tones, cream and amber, soft contrast. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts, no humans visible. 16:9 cinematic crop.

A large German Shepherd dog lying on its side on a veterinary clinic floor, alert and anxious eyes looking directly at camera, a metal water bowl and a leather leash visible nearby, blurred veterinary background with clinical equipment. Light: cool clinical white light blended with warm ambient glow, serious and urgent atmosphere. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.8, subject sharp, background softly blurred. Composition: dog occupies center-left, bowl and leash in lower right foreground, eye-level perspective emphasizing vulnerability. Style: editorial documentary photography, ultra realistic, photojournalism level. Color: muted blue-grey clinical tones with warm accent. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts. 16:9 cinematic crop.

A 4-month-old golden Labrador Retriever puppy lying on a patterned area rug, enthusiastically chewing a red Kong toy, baby teeth clearly visible, a chewed slipper and a gnawed sock scattered nearby. Light: soft natural daylight from a window, warm afternoon indoor light, gentle shadows. Camera: 35mm lens, f/2.2, puppy face and toy sharp, rug texture visible, background slightly blurred. Composition: puppy in center-left, scattered chewed items in right foreground, slightly elevated angle. Style: editorial lifestyle photography, ultra realistic, playful energy, National Geographic quality. Color: warm golden tones, cream rug, pops of red toy. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts. 16:9 cinematic crop.

A black and white tuxedo cat perched on the back of a soft grey sofa, body turned, intently and cautiously observing a white wooden baby crib with a pastel mobile of stars and clouds hanging above it. Composition: cat occupies left third looking right toward crib, rule of thirds, airy negative space. Style: editorial lifestyle photography, ultra realistic, warm and intimate. Color: soft pastels, cream, light grey, warm white. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts, no humans visible. 16:9 cinematic crop.

A medium-sized mixed-breed dog with beige and sand-colored fur, lying curled on a new soft dog bed in the corner of a minimalist modern apartment, large expressive sad but hopeful eyes looking directly at camera, a brand new red leash coiled neatly beside the bed and a fresh water bowl just within frame. Composition: dog centered slightly left, leash and bowl in right foreground, room opens to the right with empty space suggesting new beginning. Style: editorial documentary photography, ultra realistic, emotionally resonant. Color: warm beige and sand tones, muted interior neutrals, touches of red from leash. No text, no letters, no watermarks, no logos, no AI artifacts. 16:9 cinematic crop.
